title: Fees; expenses
doc_html:
§14.  Fees; expenses

All fees for licenses or other services shall be deposited in the state treasury and all expenses of the department shall be paid from the treasury under specific appropriations therefor.
doc_text:
§14.  Fees; expenses
All fees for licenses or other services shall be deposited in the state treasury and all expenses of the department shall be paid from the treasury under specific appropriations therefor.
